comment: tactical-diplomat bot band for --sim 5000 --policy tactical-pacifist (batch 10). Pacifist that routes around fights (tactical_routing_map) and only talks when a monster walls off the objective or corners it (kills_total stays 0 — pure mercy, asserted by tactical_pacifist_never_attacks_and_deterministic). A competent-mercy proxy; the blunt pacifist that talks its way through everything wins just 9.3%. No awe/cheese yet (those land batches 11-12 per docs/design/2026-07-22-mercy-economy-arc.md; this bot is extended then). Measured on the CURRENT game: wins 2453/5000 (49.1%), deaths_combat 2123, deaths_dark 424, stuck 0, kills_total 0, spared_total 85790. Records the baseline; design target is >50% and 'harder than today' after the economy lands, re-anchored under batch 12's sign-off. Band calibrated for 5000 seeds; win_pct 49 -> [40,60] with regression headroom. Only win_pct is gated (mirroring pacifist-band.json — the dark/combat-minority requirement was never claimed for a mercy policy).
